name: Commander
description: Runs the watch rotation and the chain of command.

name: Engineer
description: Keeps the reactor lit and the hull honest.

name: Medic
description: Guards the health of a sealed-city population.

name: Scientist
description: Reads the void and the genome alike.

name: Agronomist
description: Feeds a thousand mouths from hydroponic decks.

name: Security Chief
description: Keeps the peace between decks and generations.

name: Navigator
description: Owns the burn schedule and the century-long course.
